description: A designed ICE 'rogues-gallery' arrest card following the agency's standardized template. The background is a dark, slightly blurred black-and-white photograph (apparent surveillance/booking still) of a man with short dark hair and a mustache wearing a checkered shirt, looking toward the camera. Large light-blue (cyan) bold serif capital text at top reads 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL,' with a white sub-line giving date and location: '1/27/2025 | Corpus Christi, Texas'. On the left, large bold white sans-serif text labels the subject only by nationality: 'Honduran National'. Below is a white 'CRIMES:' heading with a bulleted entry: 'Aggravated assault w/deadly weapon'. The DHS/ICE seal and 'ICE' wordmark appear at the lower left. A diagonal dark-red banner ribbon across the lower-right corner reads 'CORPUS CHRISTI' (the field office). Propaganda technique: brands an individual arrest as a trophy card and foregrounds a violent felony charge plus the subject's foreign nationality and illegal status to associate immigration with crime and justify removals. Target audience: general public and supporters of stepped-up immigration enforcement. (Notably this tweet has 0 retweets per the metadata.)
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 1/27/2025 | Corpus Christi, Texas; Honduran National; CRIMES: Aggravated assault w/deadly weapon; CORPUS CHRISTI
